nodeDescription.name: n8n-nodes-preview-pdfco.PDFco Api
nodeDescription.subtitle: ={{$parameter["operation"]}}

options.name: AI Invoice Parser
options.description: Transform your invoice processing with our advanced AI. Enjoy quick, accurate data extraction that eliminates manual effort and saves you valuable time.

options.name: URL/HTML to PDF
options.description: Convert HTML or URL to PDF with advanced options (e.g. layout, orientation). Supports HTML templates (Handlebar and Mustache).

options.name: Merge PDF
options.description: Combine multiple document formats into a single PDF. Supported formats include PDF, DOC, DOCX, XLS, JPG, PNG, and more.

options.name: Split PDF
options.description: PDF Splitter that takes PDF file and splits into multiple PDF files using page index, page range, text search or barcode search

options.name: Convert To PDF
options.description: Convert a variety of formats such as URLs, HTML code, documents, spreadsheets, presentations, images, and more into PDF

options.name: Convert From PDF
options.description: Convert PDF pages to structured CSV, XML, JSON, Plain Text, Convert PDF to JPG, PDF to PNG, PDF to TIFF, and more

options.name: Add Text/Images to PDF
options.description: Add text, images, and annotations to PDF documents with precise positioning and styling options

options.name: Fill a PDF Form
options.description: Fill interactive PDF forms with text, checkboxes, and other form elements

options.name: PDF Information & Form Fields
options.description: Extract metadata and form field information from PDF documents

options.name: Compress PDF
options.description: Reduce PDF file size while maintaining quality

options.name: PDF Security
options.description: Add or remove password protection and security features from PDF documents

options.name: Rotate PDF Pages
options.description: Rotate PDF pages manually or automatically detect and fix rotation based on text analysis

options.name: Delete PDF Pages
options.description: Remove specific pages from a PDF document

options.name: Search in PDF
options.description: Search for specific text within PDF documents or scanned images

options.name: Search & Replace Text or Delete
options.description: Search and delete text, replace text, or replace text with images in PDF documents

options.name: Barcode Reader
options.description: Decode barcodes from images or PDF documents swiftly and accurately

options.name: Barcode Generator
options.description: Generate various types of barcodes including QR codes, Code 128, Code 39, and more

options.name: Make PDF Searchable or Unsearchable
options.description: Convert scanned PDF or image files into text-searchable PDFs using OCR or make them unsearchable/scanned

options.name: Upload File
options.description: Upload a file to PDF.co and get a URL

nodeDescription.description: Generate PDF, extract data from PDF, split PDF, merge PDF, convert PDF. Fill PDF forms, add text and images to pdf and much more with pdf.co!

attributes.description: Generate PDF, extract data from PDF, split PDF, merge PDF, convert PDF. Fill PDF forms, add text and images to pdf and much more with pdf.co!
attributes.name: n8n-nodes-pdfco.PDFco Api
